product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Quick Preview of chat code suggestions across multiple files 
 VS Code Gemini Code Assist  2.44.0 
 Gemini Code Assist chat provides a  quick preview 
of the collective code suggestions across multiple files in the chat. Selecting
a particular file opens the corresponding file in the editor with the first
suggestion selected by default.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Chat banner shows release channel information 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  1.23.3 
 The IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist chat banner shows the release channel that
you're currently working in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
View code diff in IntelliJ chat 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  1.23.3 
 With the  code diff view 
in IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist, you can view suggested code changes directly in
your chat with Gemini Code Assist. This feature boosts productivity by offering
immediate visibility on modifications, streamlining reviews, and enabling
precise control over integrating new code, all within the Gemini Code Assist
chat interface.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Clickable filenames in chat output 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  1.23.3 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist provides clickable filenames when it references a
file in your workspace as part of its chat response. Clicking the filename opens
the file in your workspace.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Multi-part chat code suggestions 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  1.23.3 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist now supports streamlined multi-part chat code
suggestions. You have the option to accept a single code change or all suggested
changes.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Effectively collaborate with your agent with the improved diff view functionality (Preview) 
 We've enhanced Gemini Code Assist agent mode with powerful new
editing capabilities. You can edit code changes directly in the integrated Diff
view for precise, on-the-fly adjustments. To improve clarity, we've also added
inline diffs directly in the chat, making it easier to see proposed changes at a
glance. These features give you unparalleled control and a more efficient way to
refine AI-suggested code.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Use agent mode in Gemini Code Assist for VS Code (Preview) 
 
 Tackle complex tasks with Gemini Code Assist agent mode for VS Code 
 Gemini Code Assist agent mode is available for all users. Describe your goal,
and Gemini will create a plan for you to review and approve before any code is
changed. This update removes the insiders channel requirement, and includes
persistent agent mode or interactive chat state between IDE restarts, real-time
shell command output, and faster UI performance. This collaborative approach
combines AI power with your expertise, enabling you to complete multi-step tasks
with complete control and efficiency. 
 To get started with agent mode, see
 Use agentic chat as a pair programmer .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Use Gemini Code Assist agent mode in IntelliJ (Preview) 
 
 Stay in control with interactive reviews and approvals 
 You can use Gemini Code Assist chat in agent mode to complete complex,
multi-step tasks and goals with complete control over every change. Before
making any modifications, the agent will present a plan for your review. You can
edit, ask for changes, approve, or deny any suggested changes. This
collaborative approach combines the power of AI with your expertise, resulting
in better code and a more efficient workflow. 
 To get started with agent mode, restart your IDE and follow the instructions in
 Use agentic chat as a pair programmer .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Auto Approve mode lets the agent act on your behalf (Preview) 
 Enable auto approve mode to let the agent act on your behalf. Once the agent is
done you can review and roll back changes as you see fit.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Auto Approve mode lets the Agent act on your behalf 
 Enable auto approve mode to let the agent act on your behalf. Once the agent is
done you can review and roll back changes as you see fit.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Inline diff (Preview) 
 VS Code Gemini Code Assist  2.42.0 
 Inline diff 
is available for VS Code Gemini Code Assist  2.42.0  in
 Preview . With the inline diff
view, you can visually highlight code changes directly in your editor—green for
additions, red for deletions. This feature boosts productivity by offering
immediate visibility on modifications, streamlining reviews, and enabling
precise control over integrating new code, all without leaving your current
view. 
 If preferred, you can
 change the diff view settings to have a side-by-side diff window 
instead of the inline diff.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Thinking tokens 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  1.22.1 
 You'll see thinking insights into Gemini's thought process before IntelliJ
Gemini Code Assist produces a response, to show you that Gemini is actively
working on your request.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Stop in-progress chat responses with IntelliJ 
 IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  1.22.1 
 You can
 stop chat responses 
with IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  1.22.1 . Undesired long running or errant chat
responses are immediately halted.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Improved code completion speed 
 VS Code Gemini Code Assist  2.41.0 
 Code completion suggestion speed is improved with VS Code Extension  2.41.0 .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Checkpoints, selected code snippets and terminal output, and other features are now Generally Available (GA) 
 The following features, which launched in Preview in May and June 2025, are now
 Generally Available : 
 
 Revert to checkpoints 
 Add selected code snippets to context 
 Prompt Gemini Code Assist with selected terminal output 
 Specify filenames in your workspace 
 Exclude files from Gemini Code Assist use

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 2.5 Flash models are Generally Available (GA) 
 Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 2.5 Flash are  Generally Available (GA) . These models are used for Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise, and power Gemini Code Assist's chat, code generation, and code transformation capabilities. 
 With the integration of these stable versions of Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 2.5 Flash, you'll experience a boost in how Gemini Code Assist handles complex tasks. These models excel in areas like coding, mathematics, science, and intricate reasoning, leading to more accurate and helpful suggestions.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Chat code suggestion preview 
 Chat code suggestions are  displayed in a preview block  by default with VS Code Gemini Code Assist  2.37.0 , improving the readability of generated chat responses. You can  configure preview pane settings  to alternatively display chat code suggestions as fully collapsed or expanded.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Revert to a checkpoint (Preview) 
 You can  revert to a checkpoint for chat code suggestions  with VS Code Gemini Code Assist  2.37.0 , in  Preview . Reverting to a checkpoint enables you to revert affected source files to a point before any code suggestions were applied.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Configure local codebase awareness 
 You can  configure local codebase awareness  with VS Code Gemini Code Assist  2.37.0 .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Add terminal output to the chat context 
 Terminal output can now be  attached to the chat context  with VS Code Gemini Code Assist (version  2.36.0 ). You can now ask Gemini Code Assist questions about terminal commands and output, as  Preview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Configure AI exclusion files 
 You can now  configure the use of  .aiexclude  and  .gitignore  files  to exclude files from the local context with VS Code Gemini Code Assist (version  2.36.0 ).

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Add code snippets to the chat context 
 You can now select, attach, and direct Gemini to focus on code snippets with VS Code Gemini Code Assist  (version  2.36.0 ).  Code snippet selection  enables discrete analysis of smaller code blocks instead of entire files, as  Preview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Clickable filenames in chat (Preview) 
 You can now click filenames referenced in a chat response to open the file in the IDE with VS Code Gemini Code Assist ( 2.35.0 ), as  Preview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Exclude files from local context (Preview) 
 Context exclusion of files using  .gitIgnore  is now enforced . Files present in  .gitignore  are now excluded from the local context with chat, code generation, code completion, and code transformation, as  Preview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Stop in-progress chat responses 
 You can now  stop chat responses  with VS Code Gemini Code Assist (version  2.35.0 ). Undesired long running or errant chat responses are immediately halted.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Automatic scrolling 
 VS Code Gemini Code Assist (version  2.35.0 ) now  automatically scrolls through chat responses , enabling easier and faster readability. You can disable automatic scrolling in the Gemini Code Assist settings.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Manage files and folders in the Context Drawer 
 You can now  view and manage files and folders requested to be included in Gemini Code Assist's context, using the Context Drawer . After you specify a file or folder to be used as context for your Gemini Code Assist prompts, these files and folders are placed in the Context Drawer, where you can review and remove them from the prompt context. 
 This gives you more control over which information Gemini Code Assist considers when responding to your prompts.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Gemini Code Assist now uses Gemini 2.5. These models are now used in the following experiences: 
 
 Chat 
 Code generation 
 Code transformation

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Create custom commands 
 You can now  configure and use custom commands  with IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist (version  1.15.0 ). Create, save, and execute your own pre-configured prompts to perform repetitive tasks faster and more easily in the IDE.  
 To view the custom commands settings, go to  Settings  >  Tools  >  Gemini  >  Prompt Library .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Chat responses with error messages now have action buttons for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist (version  1.15.0 ).

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Prompt with folders in your local workspace (Preview) 
 You can now  include folders from your local IDE project  for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist (version  1.14.0 ) to use as context for your prompts, in  Preview . To specify a folder in your chat prompt, type  @  and select the folder you want to specify. 
 Directing Code Assist to add folders to your chat can improve responses by specifying use of the contents within your selected folder(s), with support up to a 1M token context window.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now  include folders from your local IDE project  for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist (version  1.14.0 ) to use as context for your prompts, in  Preview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now  specify and apply rules  to each chat request with VS Code Gemini Code Assist (version  2.32.0 ).

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: VS Code Gemini Code Assist (version  2.32.0 ) now supports streamlined multi-part chat code suggestions. You have the option to accept a single code change or all suggested changes.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: VS Code Gemini Code Assist (version  2.32.0 ) now supports  creation and management of multiple chats .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed markdown rendering issues in chat for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Streamed chat responses are now generally available for IntelliJ and VS Code Gemini Code Assist. You can disable this feature in settings.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Code customization for chat is generally available ( GA ) for VS Code and IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist. This feature provides contextually relevant code suggestions and insights in your IDE's Gemini Code Assist chat interface. Code customization for chat is available without any additional configuration required. For more information on how to use code customization for chat effectively, see  Use code customization .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Local codebase awareness is now available for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist. You can now include files from your local IDE project in the prompt context by typing  @  in the chat prompt box.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now see what files are used by IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist chat and can customize the context as needed.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now configure and use custom commands in the inline chat menu and lightbulb menu for VS Code Gemini Code Assist. To view custom commands settings, go to  Settings  >  Gemini Code Assist  >  Custom Commands .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Streamed chat responses are now available in public preview for IntelliJ and VS Code Gemini Code Assist. You can disable this feature in settings.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue with an infinite progress bar while trying to log in to IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now use code customization for Gemini Code Assist Enterprise with VPC Service Controls. This allows secure access to on-premises source control systems. For more information, see  Configure VPC Service Controls for Gemini .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Gemini Code Assist now supports data residency at rest. Data residency meets compliance and regulatory requirements by allowing you to specify the geographic locations (regions) where Gemini Code Assist data is stored.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Various bug fixes and minor product enhancements for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist extension.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Gemini Code Assist now uses a code-optimized version of Gemini 2.0. This new model is used in the following experiences: 
 
 Chat 
 Code generation 
 Code transformation

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist now shows disconnected network status in the Gemini status bar instead of an error.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Code customization for Gemini Code Assist Enterprise now supports repositories hosted on the following:  
 
 GitHub Enterprise Cloud 
 GitHub Enterprise 
 GitLab 
 GitLab Enterprise 
 Bitbucket Cloud 
 Bitbucket Data Center

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Various bug fixes and minor product enhancements for VSCode Gemini Code Assist extension.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist now has a setting to block suggestions that contain citations.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed issues with Google Cloud project settings for VS Code Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: For new customers with billing accounts that have never had a Gemini Code Assist subscription, we automatically apply up to 50 license credits for the first month, regardless of Gemini Code Assist edition. For more information, see  Set up Gemini Code Assist .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist now provides citations in Gemini Chat. When you insert code from the Gemini Code Assist chat pane, and the code has citations, those citations are displayed in the editor.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Admins can now block all suggestions containing citations during code completion, generation, and chat conversation for VS Code Gemini Code Assist. If the admin level citations block is enabled, the local citations size limit is set to  0 .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Various bug fixes and minor product enhancements for VSCode and IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist extension.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The maximum number of repositories that can be indexed for Gemini Code Assist code customization has increased to 20,000. The maximum number of repositories per repository group is 500. For more information, see  Code customization overview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK) are now integrated with code customization for Gemini Code Assist. You can now use a CMEK to encrypt and control data-at-rest in a cloud service through  Cloud Key Management Service . For more information, see  Encrypt data with customer-managed encryption keys .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: VS Code Gemini Code Assist  is now a separate extension from Cloud Code.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now adjust the  cloudcode.duetAI.recitation.maxCitedLength  setting in the settings UI for VS Code Gemini Code Assist. You no longer need to update the  settings.json  file to make this adjustment. For more information, see  Disable code suggestions that match cited sources .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Gemini Code Assist for  IntelliJ  now supports code transformation. Press  Alt+\  (for Windows and Linux) or  Cmd+\  (for macOS) to use commands or natural language prompts in the Quick Pick bar to request modifications to your code, and get a diff view to show pending changes to your code.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Gemini Code Assist clients are communicating with a new API ( cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com ), which may require updates to your configuration. See  Required APIs for users behind firewalls  and  Configure VPC Service Controls  for more information.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist  is now a separate extension from Cloud Code.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now automatically or manually assign Gemini Code Assist licenses. For more information, see  Manage Gemini for Google Cloud licenses .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now purchase Gemini Code Assist Enterprise edition on the  Admin for Gemini  page within the Google Cloud console. For more information, see  Add or change Gemini for Google Cloud subscriptions .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: General bug fixes and improvements for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist right-click menu items are now listed under  Gemini , and are also available in the floating toolbar (the yellow bulb icon).

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved display of selected files using the  @  file picker in the staged prompt for VS Code Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved error handling for inline code completion for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: VS Code and IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist now support admin feedback block. This feature allows admins to control whether developers can send Gemini Code Assist feedback.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: General bug fixes and improvements to code transformation for the VS Code Gemini Code Assist extension.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved error handling for the IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist plugin. Added more actions to quickly recover from errors.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The Standard and Enterprise editions for Gemini Code Assist are now available. For more information about supported features for each edition, see the  supported features table .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now assign Gemini Code Assist subscription licenses to users in your organization. Use the  Admin for Gemini  page in the Google Cloud console or use the  billingAccounts.orders  API to view, assign, or unassign user licenses. For more information, see  Manage Gemini for Google Cloud licenses .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Local codebase awareness is now available for VS Code Gemini Code Assist. Local codebase awareness helps you with high quality code suggestions that are syntactically correct and semantically meaningful within the broader context of your codebase, when you specify files for Gemini Code Assist to use as context. You can specify files in your chat prompt by typing  @  and selecting the files. For more information, see  Code with Gemini Code Assist .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved error handling for the IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist plugin. Error messages are now actionable with precise error reasons and are supported for chat, code completion, and code generation.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Code customization is now  generally available  in Gemini Code Assist for: 
 
 VS Code with the Gemini Code Assist + Cloud Code extension (version 2.18.0+) 
 IntelliJ with the Gemini Code Assist/Cloud Code plugin (version 1.1.0) 
 Cloud Workstations 
 Cloud Shell Editor 
 
 With code customization, Gemini Code Assist lets you get enhanced code suggestions based on your organization's private codebase(s) (in  GitHub.com  or  GitLab.com ) and in line with your coding conventions. For more information, see the  code customization overview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Gemini Code Assist for  VS Code ,  Cloud Shell , and  Cloud Workstations  now supports code transformation. You can use commands or natural language prompts in the Quick Pick bar to request modifications to your code, and get a diff view to show pending changes to your code.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: General bug fixes for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now use Gemini Code Assist's  Commit  message button, which is integrated into JetBrains IDEs' default  Commit  tool window, to generate a commit message based on your changes.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Updated IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist chat UX and styling.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Chat conversation history now persists across IDE sessions and restarts for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
The IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist/Cloud Code plugin now installs a bundle of two plugins: 
 
 Google Cloud Code 
 Gemini Code Assist

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved performance and reliability in IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Code completions for IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist are now completely integrated with native IDE completion framework, which makes it easier to use and override key combinations to trigger, and less conflicting with various IDE or  Tab  based actions.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now use the arrow keys to traverse previous chat history entries to repeat and edit questions in IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now exclude any files from AI completions and chat interactions using  .aiexclude  in IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist, with a format similar to  .gitignore .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed crashing issue when using VS Code Gemini Code Assist completions.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The VS Code Gemini Code Assist extension now supports Code Transformation. Press  Ctrl+I  for Windows and Linux or  Cmd+I  for macOS and use the  /generate  command to generate code based on your prompt anywhere in the file. For more information, see  Code with Gemini Code Assist .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Gemini Code Assist is available to try at no cost until November 8, 2024, limited to one user per billing account. Customers can purchase a license on the  Gemini Admin page  in the Google Cloud console. For more information, see  Set up Gemini Code Assist for a project .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added a diff button to code snippets in chat so that code returned from Gemini Code Assist can be easily compared to the code in the VS Code editor.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added a tips card in chat showing useful keyboard shortcuts for using the VS Code Gemini Code Assist plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Rejected Gemini Code Assist code suggestions will no longer come back in the VS Code Gemini plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: General bug fixes and completion speed improvements in the Intellij Gemini plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed issue where citation warnings would persist after being ignored or deleted.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Updated Gemini Code Assist to use  Gemini 1.5 Flash model  (with 32k token window), with improved support for code explanation, unit test generation, and code transformations. Automatically triggered code completions use an 8k token window.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: API hub interaction from Cloud Code: An update to Cloud Code extension enables you to interact with any API in your API hub using a local mock server in Cloud Code, make changes to the API, and publish it back to API hub.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: API management: Use Gemini Code Assist to facilitate API design including OpenAPI spec generation with enterprise context from natural language prompts and built in visual API designer to further refine the specification.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added notification on how to set up  VPC configuration for Gemini Code Assist .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Gemini Code Assist is transitioning to a new API. This release adds a safeguard should users encounter errors.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Revamped our Gemini Code Assist enablement flow in VSCode Gemini plug-in. It now requires less steps, is more intuitive, and has a sleek new look.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The VS Code Gemini plug-in name is updated in the marketplace to Gemini Code Assist + Google Cloud Code for easier discoverability.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Yaml file support is now disabled by default for new installations of the Intellij Gemini plug-in. To enable support, please visit the settings (Settings > Tools > Gemini + Google Cloud Code > Kubernetes).

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The Intellij Gemini plug-in name updated to Gemini Code Assist / Cloud Code for easier discoverability in the marketplace.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Various fixes for Gemini error handling.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Gemini Code Assist is available to try at no cost until July 11, 2024, limited to one user per billing account. Customers can purchase a license on the  Gemini Admin page  in the Google Cloud console. For more information, see  Set up Gemini Code Assist for a project .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The Code Transformation features in Gemini Code Assist are now available in  Public Preview  for Cloud Shell. For more information, see  Use Code Transformation features .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The Transform Code features in Gemini Code Assist are now available in  Public Preview  for  Workstations  and  Cloud Shell .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Code Transformations for Gemini Code Assist in Cloud Shell are now available for  Public Preview . You can now use an inline text box directly in your code file to do the following: 
 
 Generate comment lines to document your code. 
 Troubleshoot code with issues. 
 Improve code readability. 
 Make code more efficient. 
 
 You can also view context sources of a generated response in the  Gemini: Chat  pane. 
 For more information, see  Code with Gemini Code Assist .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The Gemini Code Assist code generation feature now allows users to generate code repeatedly at the same cursor location.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue where empty files weren't being included as chat context.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue where handling very small .csv, .tsv, and .jsonl files crashed the Gemini Cloud Code extension.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed telemetry data issue in the  VSCode Gemini Code Assist plug-in .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI for Developers is now Gemini Code Assist.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue in the Intellij Duet AI plug-in where empty files were not being included as chat context.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The code generation feature has been updated to the Intellij Duet AI plug-in to allow users to generate code repeatedly at the same cursor location.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The  Intellij Duet AI plug-in   Skaffold version  has been updated to 2.10.1

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Thumbs up and down in Duet AI chat for quick response quality feedback.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The context source panel in the  VSCode Duet AI plug-in  chat window now displays which file was included in the user's chat request.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Retrieval-augmented generation is rolling out in the  Intellij Duet AI plug-in  as an experiment to select users to improve code suggestions for their repository.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved notifications when the  Intellij Duet AI plug-in  needs action or has an error.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added thumbs up and thumbs down buttons in the  Intellij Duet AI plug-in  chat window for quick response quality feedback .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved notifications when Duet AI needs action or has an error.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You can now use Duet AI to help you create a synthetic monitor in  Cloud Monitoring . This feature is in Public Preview. For more information, see   Create a synthetic monitor .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Local code customization is enabled in the  VSCode Duet AI plug-in  as an experiment to select users to improve code suggestions. Additional files in the user's local directory will open when the user requests code generation. Local files are scored and included in the response based on relevance to the user's active context.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved error handling and messaging in the  VSCode Duet AI plug-in  code editor and in chat. Error specific actions are now provided to better assist users in resolving errors.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved confusing messaging and troubleshooting steps for permission denied errors and API enablement errors in the  VSCode Duet AI plug-in .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI Chat in Google Cloud console now uses Gemini 1.0 Pro models when giving responses.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved code completion triggering logic to reduce occurrences of code completion previously dismissed.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Updated Duet AI for Developers code completion model to increase response accuracy.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Updated Duet AI for Developers chat assistance and Smart Actions to use  Gemini 1.0 Pro models .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI Chat UI improvements, such as better message rendering and code formatting when using "Explain this" smart action

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI for Developers is available to try at no cost until May 11, 2024, limited to one user per billing account. Customers can purchase a license on the  Duet AI Admin page  in the Google Cloud console. For more information, see  Set up Duet AI for a project .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue in VSCode Duet AI plug-in where users might get a notification about an unexpected error when enabling Duet AI.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue where users with certain network/firewall configurations are unable to use Duet AI Chat.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue where some users were frequently asked to log in with VSCode Duet AI plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed an issue where VSCode Duet AI plug-in is occasionally unable to start after log in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added a Duet AI code generation hint tooltip.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Allow enabling Duet API during onboarding flow

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added a Duet AI code generation hint tooltip in VSCode Duet AI plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added project selection from VSCode Duet AI plug-in quickpick.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Added Duet AI smart actions. Highlight the desired code, right-click, and select: 
 
 "Explain this" to have Duet AI explain the code 
 "Generate Unit Tests" to have Duet AI generate unit tests for you

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Easier onboarding in VSCode Duet AI plug-in for Duet AI with API enable button.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Partially accept a Duet AI code suggestion with  Shift  +  Enter

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fix Duet AI generation hint re-appearing between sessions in VSCode Duet AI plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Fixed completion result only displaying one suggestion in VSCode Duet AI plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Updated code generation shortcut to avoid key binding conflict with Intellij new UI

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Added detailed and actionable message to Duet AI error notification.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI for Developers is now GA!

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Duet AI , an AI-powered collaborator in Google Cloud, is  Generally available . The Generally available release includes the following: 
 
 Duet AI for Developers  is  Generally available . 
 The Duet AI pane in  VSCode ,  JetBrains ,  Cloud Workstations  and  Cloud Shell Editor  uses an improved model with higher accuracy and more complete responses. 
 In  VSCode , a sign-in expiration issue for Duet AI has been fixed. 
 In  VSCode  and  JetBrains  IDEs, you can enable Duet AI entirely from the IDE instead of visiting the Google Cloud console. 
 In  VSCode  and  JetBrains  IDEs, improved filtering and sorting reduces the amount of generated code that contains only comments. 
 Improved logic for defining the final code completion token. This resolves issues where extra closing brackets were suggested and where lines of code broken in the middle were returned. 
 In  JetBrains  IDEs, Duet AI cancels code generation when the user changes the code position before a response is returned. This ensures generated code isn't rendered in the wrong place.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI for VS Code  provides an indication that code generation is in progress.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
Duet AI for Cloud Shell is now available. Use Duet AI, your AI-powered collaborator, to accomplish tasks more effectively and efficiently. Duet AI provides contextualized responses to your prompts to help guide you on what you're trying to do with your code. It also shares source citations regarding which documentation and code samples the assistant used to generate its responses.  
 If you use the latest version of the Cloud Shell editor, which is Code - OSS based, you can use Duet AI for Cloud Shell. For more information, see the  Duet AI in Google Cloud overview  and  Code with Duet AI assistance .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI  in Google Cloud has fewer false positive responses and increased its response length for questions about code.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI  has an improved threshold to filter out low quality code completions.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI  added multi-file support for code generation.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI  for Developers code generation and code completion latency has been reduced when it's used in IntelliJ and VSCode.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update:
The following improvements have been made when using  using IntelliJ IDEA and other JetBrains IDEs with Duet AI : 
 
 Duet AI supports linux ARM builds in IntelliJ 
 A daily sign-in expiration issue has been fixed. 
 Linux support on JetBrains IDE's has been improved. 
 Chat in IntelliJ and JetBrains IDEs is available in  Preview . 
 Confidence scoring is enabled which should improve code completion quality.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: VPC Service Controls for Duet AI  is  Generally Available .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI for Cloud Workstations  is available.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI for VS Code  is available in  Cloud Shell Editor .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: You don't need to switch between using REST and gRPC when using  Duet AI . Duet AI does this for you.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improvements to the Duet AI code generation behavior including more relevant results and better feedback.

update: Improvements to the Intellij Duet AI plug-in error handling.

update: Updated the button to generate code with the VSCode Duet AI plug-in.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improving the way the Intellij Duet AI plug-in code suggestions interact with the IDE's built in code completions. Duet AI will not display its suggestions when the IDE's code completions are available. To trigger Duet AI instead: hit "Escape" to dismiss the IDE's suggestions and Duet will automatically trigger.

update: Update the Intellij Duet AI plug-in code generation gutter icon

update: Improved Intellij Duet AI plug-in filtering logic to provide better results.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Decreased the latency of VSCode Duet AI plug-in requests.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: VSCode Duet AI plug-in should show more relevant completion results and fewer "noisy" results.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Improved Intellij Duet AI plug-in filtering logic to provide better results.

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: Duet AI , an AI-powered collaborator in Google Cloud, is now available in  Preview .

product: Gemini Code Assist Standard and Enterprise
update: The Intellij Duet AI plug-in and VSCode Duet AI plug-in are now available in public preview. Use Duet AI, your AI-powered collaborator, to accomplish tasks more effectively and efficiently. Duet AI provides contextualized responses to your prompts to help guide you on what you're trying to do with your code. It also shares source citations regarding which documentation and code samples the assistant used to generate its responses. You can do this right in the IDE to avoid having to context-switch out to your browser or documentation.
